title: Nursery Rhyme. LXX. Tales.
content:
Little Tom Tittlemouse,
        Lived in a bell-house;
        The bell-house broke,
        And Tom Tittlemouse woke.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. LXX. Tales." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
